race.name: Moraloppet
race.tagline: Forty-two kilometers on the Vasaloppet Arena — skiing in the footsteps of kings from Oxberg to Mora.

vitals.aid_stations: Aid stations along the Vasaloppet course

climate.description: The Vasaloppet Arena in Dalarna provides reliable winter conditions in January. Temperatures typically range from -15°C to -5°C. As a January race, cold and dark conditions prevail.
challenges: Early season — some skiers still building fitness
Continental cold requires proper layering strategy
Wax selection in consistently cold conditions

course.primary: Uses the iconic Vasaloppet Arena course from Oxberg to Mora Ski Stadium — the final 42km of the legendary Vasaloppet route, finishing at the same historic Mora finishing straight.
course.surface: World-class Vasaloppet Arena groomed classic tracks
features: Uses the final 42km of the Vasaloppet course
Finishes at the iconic Mora Ski Stadium

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Benefits enormously from the Vasaloppet Arena infrastructure and world-class grooming. The connection to the Vasaloppet course adds prestige. Ski Classics Challengers and 'The Originals' membership rounds out the profile.

history.summary: Moraloppet was established in the 1990s to offer skiers the chance to race on the iconic Vasaloppet Arena from Oxberg to Mora without the mass-start intensity of the main Vasaloppet event. The race uses the final 42km of the legendary Vasaloppet route, finishing at the famous Mora Ski Stadium. It is part of both the Ski Classics Challengers circuit and the Svenska Langlopscupen 'The Originals.'
notable_facts: Uses the final 42km of the legendary Vasaloppet course
Finishes at the iconic Mora Ski Stadium finishing straight
Benefits from Vasaloppet Arena's world-class grooming infrastructure

youtube_data.search_query: Moraloppet cross country ski race Oxberg to Mora

videos.title: Vasaloppet 2025 -  A Cross Country Ski Journey in Sweden
videos.description:
Ever wonder what it’s like to ski 90KM across Sweden in the legendary Vasaloppet? This is the classic cross country skiing race for beginners to professionals!

Join our group of friends as we take on the 2025 Vasaloppet, one of the world’s most iconic cross-country ski races. We follow  a seasoned Swedish skier, (and the rest of us!) as we battle frosty weather, test our endurance, and soak in Sweden’s breathtaking winter scenery. If you’re curious about long-distance Nordic skiing, this is your front-row seat to a true winter sports challenge.

0:00 – What is the Vasaloppet
2:03 – Preparing for the race
3:32 – Race Day
4:43 - The 90 km Race

Enjoy the video? Drop a comment about your own ski adventures and hit the like button if you’re up for more outdoor travel videos!

videos.title: Vasaloppet
videos.description: Vasaloppet är världens största långlopp på skidor. Traditionen är lång och hundratusentals skidåkare har kämpat sig fram i Vasaloppsspåret sedan starten 1922. För att klara av utmaningen på 90 km krävs kontinuerlig träning och noggranna förberedelser. Åkstilen är klassisk och naturupplevelsen magisk. I Sverige följs loppet av två miljoner tv-tittare. Nu är det dags att anta utmaningen!

videos.description:

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/andreasfausko/

videos.curation_reason: Detailed course preview and race strategy guide from experienced skier covering terrain and tactics.

videos.title: Moraloppet 2026 - stök och stoj i Vasaloppsspåret
videos.description:
Moraloppet är kanske Sveriges största seedningslopp för Vasaloppet och det följer Halvvasans sträckning, men med målgång i Hemus. Jag for dit för att träna på att tävla, vilket behövs för längdskidslopp - det är inte så lätt. Förvisso kom både jag själv ut utrustningen hel i mål (nåja, båda mina kameror fick slut på batteri) vilket verkligen inte var en självklarhet. Delvis pga väldigt snabba spår.

Moraloppet igår i cupen svenska långlopp på längdskidor med namn "the Originals". Dit hör även: craft ski marathon, Billingens långlopp, Engelbrektsloppet, Bessemerloppet, Lofsdalen Epic och Idre Classic. Moraloppet är 42km långt och har en Stifa på 12,3.

Innehåll:
00:00 Inledning innan start
03:18 Start till Vasslan
05:57 Vasslan till Oxberg
08:30 Oxberg till Hökberg
10:28 Hökberg till Eldris
13:10 Eldris till Mål (Hemus)
15:08 Eftersnack
videos.curation_reason: Recent 2026 race-specific vlog content focusing specifically on Moraloppet experience.

videos.curation_reason: 2026 first-person racing vlog with pre-race preparation and race experience content.

quotes.text: The course is as mentioned 90 km with 900 M of elevation gain a lot of people think that the course is flat but it's definitely not flat. Once the start gun goes off it's going to be a rush towards the first climb - after the starting straight you go right into the first climb so people are going to rush through then it's going to go from 100 to zero in a second.

Queuing is inevitable and there's nothing you can do - just relax don't stress and just go with the flow. By stressing you're just risking breaking your pole and upsetting all the other people around you. You're going to get to the top and it might take you 30 minutes or it might take you 1 hour and 30 minutes but you will get to the top eventually.
